name: Diamond Banc
description_short: Diamond Banc is a national jewelry buyer and lender offering collateral-based loans, direct sales, and consignment services for luxury items like diamonds, watches, and designer jewelry.
description_long: Diamond Banc positions itself as 'the Nation's Premier Jewelry Buyer & Lender,' operating physical office locations across the United States with an online platform for remote transactions. The company was founded to provide liquidity solutions for owners of high-value jewelry and luxury goods without requiring the sale of their assets. Diamond Banc specializes in three distinct service models: secured lending against jewelry collateral, direct purchase of jewelry items, and a consignment service called Sellers Agent Service that markets items nationally. Their primary focus is on luxury goods including Rolex watches, diamonds, gold, and designer jewelry from brands like Cartier, Tiffany & Co., Van Cleef & Arpels, and Bulgari. The company emphasizes personalized expert evaluation, with each item personally assessed rather than through automated processes, and offers same-day funding for in-person transactions or 24-hour turnaround for online submissions. Diamond Banc's competitive advantages include nationwide reach, multiple service options beyond traditional pawn lending, and a consignment model that claims to earn clients up to 15% more value plus interest-free advances. However, as a collateral-based lender, the company operates in a high-margin financial services space where borrowing against jewelry typically carries higher costs than traditional lending. The company does not disclose loan terms, interest rates, or fees on their website, which is standard opacity in the pawn and collateral lending industry. Prospective borrowers should understand that defaulting on a jewelry-backed loan results in loss of the collateral, and the true cost of borrowing may exceed conventional personal loans.
address: Columbus Center Floor, 1 Alhambra Plz PH, #1420, Coral Gables, FL 33134

company_info.headquarters: Columbus Center Floor, 1 Alhambra Plz PH, #1420, Coral Gables, FL 33134

pros: Offers three distinct liquidity options (loans, direct sales, consignment) rather than just pawn lending
Claims to provide 24-hour offer and funding for online submissions, plus same-day funding for in-person visits
Specializes in luxury items (Rolex, Cartier, Tiffany) with expert personal evaluation rather than automated assessment
Consignment service (Sellers Agent Service) markets items nationally and claims to earn clients up to 15% more value
Operates nationwide with multiple physical office locations plus full online service capability
Provides interest-free advances on consignment items, allowing cash access without borrowing costs
Transparent about accepting luxury designer brands and high-end timepieces with dedicated buying expertise
cons: No loan terms, interest rates, APRs, or fees disclosed on website — typical industry opacity that makes cost comparison impossible
Collateral-based lending means default results in permanent loss of the jewelry item with no redemption path beyond repayment
No information about loan-to-value ratios, repayment terms, or prepayment penalties
Jewelry valuations are subjective and may differ significantly from independent appraisals or insurance values
Limited to customers with luxury goods; not accessible to borrowers without high-value jewelry collateral
best_for: Owners of luxury watches (especially Rolex) or designer jewelry seeking liquidity without selling
High-net-worth individuals needing short-term cash against jewelry collateral while retaining ownership
Sellers of luxury goods seeking multiple valuation and sale options including consignment maximization
Customers in areas with Diamond Banc office locations who prefer in-person transactions with expert evaluators
diagnosis: Diamond Banc is best suited for owners of luxury jewelry and watches who need quick access to cash and prefer retaining ownership through secured lending, or who want expert evaluation and multiple sales options. The primary caveat is that borrowing costs and terms are not disclosed, making this suitable only for customers who understand collateral-based lending and can afford to lose their jewelry if they default on the loan.
services: Secured loans against jewelry and luxury goods collateral with same-day or 24-hour funding
Direct purchase (buying) of diamonds, gold, designer jewelry, and luxury watches
Specialty Rolex watch buying and equity loans against Rolex timepieces
Designer jewelry buying (Cartier, Tiffany & Co., Van Cleef & Arpels, Bulgari brands)
Consignment service (Sellers Agent Service) with nationwide marketing and interest-free cash advances
Online quote requests with mail-in jewelry evaluation
In-office personal evaluation and appraisal by jewelry experts
Secure shipping and handling of luxury items
